# OmniPost Alpha Launch Plan

<!-- Generated by Retort -->
<!-- Orchestrator: Team-based execution plan -->
<!-- Target: Alpha release -->

## Alpha Definition

**Alpha** = OmniPost is functional enough for early adopters to:
1. Sign up and authenticate
2. Connect at least one platform
3. Create, adapt, and publish content
4. View engagement analytics

**Not in Alpha**: Pricing/payments, referral program, LinkedIn prospecting, multi-user collaboration, mobile app.

---

## Current State Assessment

| Area | Status | Blocker? |
|------|--------|----------|
| Frontend pages (10) | Complete | No |
| API routes (33) | 65% complete | No - core publishing routes work |
| Database schema (13 models) | Defined but not initialized | **YES** |
| Auth (JWT) | Logic complete, middleware missing | **YES** |
| Security (rate limit, sanitize, CSP) | Implemented | No |
| Tests (15 files, ~47% coverage) | Exist but can't run (no node_modules) | **YES** |
| Build | Can't build (no node_modules) | **YES** |
| Feature flags | Working | No |
| Known bugs | 4 high-priority open | **YES** (BUG-04, 06, 07, 08) |

---

## Phase 1: Unblock (Team: Backend + Security)

**Goal**: Get the project building, tests passing, auth working.

### Task 1.1: Fix auth middleware (CRITICAL)
**Team**: Security
**File**: `middleware.ts` (new, project root)
- Create Next.js middleware that validates JWT from cookies
- Injects `x-user-id`, `x-user-name`, `x-user-role` headers
- Without this, ALL auth checks fail on real requests

### Task 1.2: Fix BUG-08 — Token null check
**Team**: Security
**File**: `lib/auth/auth-service.ts`
- Add null check for token in verification flow

### Task 1.3: Fix BUG-04 — Error boundaries
**Team**: Frontend
**File**: `components/ErrorBoundary.tsx` (new or update)
- Wrap dashboard pages with error boundaries
- Prevent single component crashes from taking down the app

### Task 1.4: Fix BUG-06 — Rate limit race condition
**Team**: Backend
**File**: `app/api/_utils/rateLimit.ts`
- Fix in-memory store eviction under concurrent load
- Add atomic counter operations

### Task 1.5: Fix BUG-07 — Feature flag cascade
**Team**: Backend
**File**: `app/api/parse/route.ts`
- Decouple unrelated feature flag checks
- Parse endpoint should only check textParser flag

---

## Phase 2: Polish Core Flow (Team: Frontend + Backend)

**Goal**: The sign-up → connect → publish → analyze flow works end-to-end.

### Task 2.1: Onboarding flow
**Team**: Frontend
- After signup, redirect to guided onboarding (not blank dashboard)
- Step 1: Connect first platform
- Step 2: Create first post
- Step 3: Publish

### Task 2.2: Signup page optimization
**Team**: Frontend
- Apply signup-flow-cro skill framework:
  - Social auth (Google/GitHub) as primary
  - Single email field for traditional signup
  - "Start Publishing Free" CTA
  - Trust signals below form

### Task 2.3: Landing page CRO
**Team**: Frontend + Marketing
- Apply page-cro skill framework:
  - Hero: outcome headline + product screenshot
  - Problem-agitate-solution below fold
  - Social proof section
  - Feature walkthrough with platform screenshots
  - Final CTA

### Task 2.4: Complete partial API routes
**Team**: Backend
- Priority routes for alpha:
  - `/api/scheduler` — scheduling is core to the product
  - `/api/leads` — basic lead capture for waitlist
  - `/api/forms` — form builder for lead magnets

---

## Phase 3: Analytics & Tracking (Team: Marketing + Backend)

**Goal**: We can measure what matters from day one.

### Task 3.1: Implement event tracking
**Team**: Backend
- Apply analytics-tracking skill AARRR framework:
  - `signup_completed`, `platform_connected`, `post_published`
  - `pricing_page_viewed`, `trial_started`, `upgrade_initiated`
- Add to existing engagement-metrics API

### Task 3.2: UTM parameter handling
**Team**: Frontend
- Capture UTM params on landing page
- Store in cookie/session for attribution
- Pass through to signup event

### Task 3.3: Core funnels
**Team**: Marketing
- Configure: Landing → Signup → Platform Connected → First Post → Retained (Day 7)
- Dashboard widget for conversion rates

---

## Phase 4: Launch Prep (Team: Marketing + Docs)

**Goal**: Assets and channels ready for alpha announcement.

### Task 4.1: Content package
**Team**: Marketing (using content-strategy + launch-strategy skills)
- Launch blog post
- 10+ social media posts (staggered)
- Product Hunt submission assets
- Launch email for waitlist

### Task 4.2: Pricing page
**Team**: Frontend + Marketing (using pricing-strategy skill)
- Free / Pro ($19/mo) / Team ($49/mo) tiers
- Feature comparison table
- FAQ section
- No payment processing yet — just "Coming Soon" or waitlist

### Task 4.3: Documentation
**Team**: Docs
- Getting started guide
- Platform connection guides (per platform)
- API documentation (for developer audience)

### Task 4.4: SEO foundations
**Team**: Marketing (using seo-audit + site-architecture skills)
- Meta tags on all pages
- Schema markup for SaaS product
- robots.txt and sitemap.xml
- Open Graph tags for social sharing

---

## Phase 5: Launch (Team: All)

**Goal**: Coordinated alpha launch following launch-strategy skill.

### Launch Day Checklist
- [ ] Flip launch page live
- [ ] Send launch email
- [ ] Post on Product Hunt (Tuesday-Thursday, 12:01 AM PT)
- [ ] Publish blog post
- [ ] Social media blitz (all platforms)
- [ ] Founder posts (Twitter + LinkedIn)
- [ ] Submit to Hacker News, Reddit, Indie Hackers
- [ ] Monitor and respond to all comments (< 30 min)

---

| Phase | Backend | Frontend | Security | Marketing | Docs | Testing |
|-------|---------|----------|----------|-----------|------|---------|
| 1. Unblock | BUG-06, 07 | BUG-04 | Middleware, BUG-08 | — | — | — |
| 2. Polish | Scheduler, leads, forms | Onboarding, signup, landing | — | Landing CRO | — | E2E for core flow |
| 3. Analytics | Event tracking API | UTM capture | — | Funnels | — | Tracking validation |
| 4. Launch Prep | — | Pricing page | — | Content, SEO | Guides | — |
| 5. Launch | Monitoring | — | — | Execute launch | — | Smoke tests |

## Success Metrics (Alpha)

| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| Signups (week 1) | 100+ | signup_completed events |
| Platform connections | 50+ | platform_connected events |
| Posts published | 200+ | post_published events |
| Day 7 retention | 30%+ | Return visits |
| NPS (alpha users) | 40+ | In-app survey |
| Critical bugs found | < 10 | Issue tracker |
